title: request_commit_actual_gap.py output
description: Requires --component or --supplier (never neither). component_breakdown: single-element array (the whole fixed component, no grouping) when filters.component is set; one row per component_category when filters.component is null (cross-component supplier run). criticality_breakdown: one row per component_criticality (filters.component set) or per (component_category, component_criticality) (filters.component null). Each row's nested gap-stat sub-objects are flattened into prefixed scalar columns (committed_later_*, delayed_beyond_commit_*) rather than nested objects, to match the flat-record convention used by every other breakdown-producing operation.

component_category.description: Present only when filters.component is null (cross-component supplier run).

on_time_as_requested_count.description: POs delivered exactly on the originally requested date (commit_date == request_date).

committed_later_count.description: POs where commit_date was pushed out past request_date.

component_breakdown.description: Single row (whole component) when filters.component is set; one row per component_category when it's null.

criticality_breakdown.description: One row per component_criticality (filters.component set) or per (component_category, component_criticality) (filters.component null).
